description_long: This is a simple, straight ladder constructed from light brown wood, featuring two vertical side rails and four evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The ladder has a minimalistic design with no visible hardware, reinforcements, or safety features. The wood appears to be unfinished or lightly finished, giving it a matte, natural appearance. The rungs are rectangular in profile and securely joined to the side rails, forming a sturdy climbing structure. The overall proportions suggest it is suitable for light-duty use, such as accessing low rooftops, shelves, or for gardening tasks in urban environments. There are no additional attachments, feet, or handrails, making it a basic, utilitarian ladder.
description: A simple, light brown wooden ladder with four rectangular rungs and two vertical side rails, designed for basic climbing tasks. The ladder has a natural, matte finish and lacks any visible safety features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four horizontal rungs and both vertical side rails clearly.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the thin, flat nature of the ladder and the protrusion of the rungs.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the rungs and rails from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the ladder's slim profile and rung extensions.
